assertions.assertion: Lists all four signing behaviors: SignAssertion, SignResponse, SignBoth, DoNotSign
assertions.rationale: Only lists three (Sign Assertion, Sign Response, Sign Both). DoNotSign is missing.

assertions.assertion: Recommends SignBoth for the specific requirement of signing both assertion and response
assertions.rationale: Suggests signing both for the use case.

assertions.assertion: Notes that SignAssertion is the default and most interoperable option
assertions.rationale: Notes assertion signing is most common and interoperable.

assertions.assertion: Warns that DoNotSign should only be used for testing, never in production
Shows how to set SigningBehavior on the SamlServiceProvider or as a default via options.Saml.DefaultSigningBehavior
assertions.rationale: Shows a commented-out example but not the actual API — no options.Saml.DefaultSigningBehavior.
